summary: Frontend-only testing of expo-router replica launcher routing fix. All 5 acceptance criteria PASS: (1) root URL '/' redirects to /replica-launcher and shows the launcher (not the default Expo splash); (2) launcher renders with both buttons (testIDs: trade-replica-launcher, open-trade-submitted-replica-button, open-trade-rejected-replica-button); (3) /trade-submitted-replica renders correctly with all 5 testIDs and exact texts 'Trade Submitted' and 'Your trade has been submitted successfully'; (4) /trade-rejected-replica renders correctly with all 5 testIDs and exact texts 'Trade Rejected' and 'Your trade has been Decline / card not Available'; (5) full navigation flow Launcherâ†’Submittedâ†’Doneâ†’Launcherâ†’Rejectedâ†’Check tradesâ†’Launcher works. Direct URL access to all three routes also verified. Screenshots confirm pixel-perfect rendering of illustrations, scalloped badges, titles, subtitles, and dark CTA buttons.
critical_code_review_comments: Both replica screens use router.back() on their primary CTAs. This relies on a non-empty history stack; when a user lands directly on /trade-submitted-replica or /trade-rejected-replica via deep link (no prior entry), router.back() is a no-op. Consider router.replace('/replica-launcher') for deterministic behavior. Not a regression for the requested flow (tap from launcher then back) â€” current tests confirm it works.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Preview base URL is read from /app/frontend/.env: EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL=https://exact-replica-ui-3.preview.emergentagent.com (not the URL embedded in the review request). All replica testIDs are intact: trade-replica-launcher, open-trade-submitted-replica-button, open-trade-rejected-replica-button, trade-submitted-replica + success-{illustration,badge,title,subtitle,done-button}, trade-rejected-replica + rejected-{illustration,badge,title,subtitle,check-trades-button}. No backend involvement.
rca_of_issue: Previous issue (root URL showed default Emergent splash instead of launcher) was fixed in /app/frontend/app/index.tsx by replacing the placeholder home content with `<Redirect href='/replica-launcher' />` from expo-router. Verified working: page.url after loading '/' is '/replica-launcher' and the launcher testID is visible.
